creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
We are now using (expected to use) Bugzilla for more than two months.

Having https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/page.cgi?id=fields.html#bug_status
not reflect those value used, day by day, in the tool, does not make
sense.

How can this be blocked by any (non-)action on bugmeisters side?  Can 
you please document what you had in mind when putting in place what is
in place today?  And updated, if there are changes later on?
